recommendations.title: The Last American Virgin
recommendations.overview: The friendship of a group of young friends struggling with teen sex, drugs, and work is jeopardized by a romantic interest which may turn pals into bitter rivals.

recommendations.title: Snatchers
recommendations.overview: After status-obsessed teen Sara has sex for the first time, she wakes up the next day nine months pregnant-with an alien.

recommendations.title: The Manual of Love
recommendations.overview: Four intertwined stories on the joys and sorrows of love.

recommendations.title: The Oh in Ohio
recommendations.overview: Frustrated with their relationship, Priscilla and Jack decide to take a break. While Jack moves into a new place of his own and starts dating a student, Priscilla discovers the joys of self-pleasuring and finds an unusual bedmate.

recommendations.title: Teen Titans Go! To the Movies
recommendations.overview: All the major DC superheroes are starring in their own films, all but the Teen Titans, so Robin is determined to remedy this situation by getting over his role as a sidekick and becoming a movie star. Thus, with a few madcap ideas and an inspirationa

recommendations.title: Sex and Death 101
recommendations.overview: A guy's life is turned around by an email, which includes the names of everyone he's had sex with and ever will have sex with. His situation gets worse when he encounters a femme fatale who targets men guilty of sex crime.

recommendations.title: Goodbye First Love
recommendations.overview: A 15-year-old discovers the joys and heartaches of first love with an older teen, but in the ensuing years, cannot seem to move past their breakup.

recommendations.title: Babyteeth
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill teen upsets her parents when she falls in love with a small-time drug dealer.

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: Tini: The New Life of Violetta
recommendations.overview: A teen star ventures out to the Italian countryside for a summer and emerges a new artist.
